stop.name: Paris (Pershing - Porte Maillot)
stop.description:
Station is located between Palais des Congrès and the ring road (Périphérique). 
Since December 2025, some departures and arrivals in Paris will be operated from Pershing bus station at Porte Maillot. Your platform of departure on : https://bit.ly/4qmXEue

stop.name: Bergamo (Orio al Serio Airport - BGY)
stop.description:
Platform 6
ATTENTION for the following lines: 
Line K350 (operated by Orio Shuttle) will depart from platform 2,3,4 (direction Milan Centrale) 
Line K358 (operated by Orio Shuttle/Locatelli) will depart from platform 7 (direction Malpensa)
Line CIT3146 (Livigno Express) bus stop in front of exit 3

stop.name: Milan (Malpensa Airport Terminal 2)
stop.description:
Flixbus: platform 11 (next to Train station). 
OrioShuttle - line K358: platform 5 (to Monza, BGY Airport, Bergamo). 
Terravision - line CIT3190: platforms 1, 2 or 3 (arrivals). 
Flibco - lines CIT3197 and CIT3198: parking lot in front of Arrivals (platform 8).

stop.name: Milan (Malpensa Airport Terminal 1)
stop.description:
Flixbus: platform 7 (floor -1).
OrioShuttle - line K358: platform 5 (to Monza, BGY Airport, Bergamo).
Terravision - line CIT3190: platforms 1, 2 or 3 (floor -1).
Flibco - lines CIT3197 and CIT3198: platforms 6 and 8 (floor -1).
Volpi - line CIT3166: platform 6 (floor -1).
